title: Lifesteal Core
description: A dramatic and feature-rich LifeSteal plugin for Minecraft servers. Take hearts from your victims, craft revival beacons, and experience epic death announcements!
body:
![LifeSteal Core](https://r2.e-z.host/12f8b00f-0f0d-48e2-ba84-a304627a1143/6funsf86.png)

# LifeSteal Core
### A fully-featured LifeSteal plugin with advanced configuration and dramatic effects

## ✦ Key Features
- Steal hearts from players upon killing them
- Dramatic death & revival announcements with sound effects
- Custom Revival Beacon crafting system
- Advanced in-game configuration GUI
- Heart withdrawal and deposit system
- Automatic ban system for players with no hearts

## ✦ Advanced Configuration
![Advanced Configuration](https://r2.e-z.host/12f8b00f-0f0d-48e2-ba84-a304627a1143/ued7p393.gif)

Everything can be configured through our intuitive GUI:
- Default/Min/Max Hearts
- Multiple Difficulty Settings
- Custom Recipe Editor
- Heart Item Customization
- All editable in-game!

## ✦ Dramatic Death System
![Dramatic Death System](https://r2.e-z.host/12f8b00f-0f0d-48e2-ba84-a304627a1143/ed614qsb.png)

When a player loses their final heart:
- Server-wide dramatic announcement
- Ender Dragon death sound effect
- Custom ban screen
- Revival system using beacons

## ✦ Easy Configuration
![Easy Configuration](https://r2.e-z.host/12f8b00f-0f0d-48e2-ba84-a304627a1143/iuyhweqe.png)

- Simple and clean interface
- Visual recipe editor
- Real-time configuration updates
- No server restarts needed

## ✦ Plugin Information
- Version: 1.0.0
- Supports: 1.13 - 1.20.4
- Dependencies: None
- Permissions: Fully configurable

### Need Help?
- Check our [Wiki](https://github.com/KoopaCode/LifeSteal-Core/wiki)
- Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/kRsGZgpkTD)
- Report bugs on [GitHub](https://github.com/KoopaCode/LifeSteal-Core/issues)

### Support the Development
If you enjoy this plugin, please leave a review! ⭐
